description_long: This jewelry object consists of three distinct, elongated pieces arranged side by side on a blue rectangular backing, each with a slightly different shape and taper. The pieces have a matte, pale yellowish surface that appears to be smooth and solid, possibly resembling carved bone, ivory, or resin. The edges of each piece are gently rounded, and the surfaces are free of any visible engravings, gemstones, or intricate ornamentation. The blue backing has a slightly irregular, jagged edge, suggesting it may be a temporary display or packaging material. There are no visible clasps, chains, or fasteners, indicating these may be pendants or brooches awaiting attachment. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on the natural form and subtle color contrast between the jewelry and the backing.
description: Three elongated, pale yellow jewelry pieces with smooth surfaces are arranged on a blue rectangular backing, featuring a minimalist and unadorned design.
description_view_0: Three pale yellow, tapered pieces are clearly visible on a blue backing, showing their flat faces and subtle surface texture.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the thinness of the pieces and their slight curvature, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: The reverse view displays the backs of the three pieces, mirroring the arrangement and shape seen from the front.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, emphasizing the slimness and edge contours of the jewelry pieces.
